commands.review_summary:
The PR adds QA Lab YAML scenarios for existing HTTP/API proof tests, moves four script tests under `test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime`, and updates changed-test routing to point at the new QA Lab evidence files.

PR surface: Tests +10, Other +161. Total +171 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR reorganizes and catalogs existing test evidence rather than reporting a user-facing bug. The relevant check is whether the moved tests and YAML scenario metadata match current QA Lab and changed-test routing contracts.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the remaining action is normal maintainer review, CI, and optional broader Docker proof.

target.title: test: fold HTTP API script proof into QA Lab
target.body:
## Summary

- Fold the OpenAI-compatible chat tools, OpenAI web_search minimal, native web_search assertion, and OpenWebUI probe script tests into QA Lab native evidence paths.
- Add QA scenario YAML entries for the folded HTTP/API proof so taxonomy coverage now fulfills `tool-invocation-api`, `openai-compatible-apis`, `reasoning-and-cache-controls`, `openai-native-web-search`, and `web-search-and-fetch`.
- Update changed-test routing so edits to the existing Docker/client scripts run the new QA Lab evidence files.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal-assertions.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/qa-coverage-report.ts --json >/tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-after.json`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 scripts/test-projects.test-support.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal-assertions.e2e.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/openwebui-probe.e2e.test.ts qa/scenarios/runtime/openai-compatible-chat-tools.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/openai-web-search-minimal.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/openai-web-search-native-assertions.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/openwebui-openai-compatible.yaml`
- `git diff --cached --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: HTTP/API script proof is now represented as QA Lab scenario evidence with primary taxonomy IDs instead of only living under `test/scripts`.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout on this branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Focused Vitest command listed above, QA coverage report command listed above, oxfmt check, staged whitespace check, and local autoreview.

Evidence after fix: QA coverage report returned 126 scenarios, 172 coverage IDs, 106 primary coverage IDs, 0 missing coverage IDs, 0 unknown taxonomy IDs, and 28 fulfilled taxonomy features. The target IDs `tool-invocation-api`, `openai-compatible-apis`, `reasoning-and-cache-controls`, `openai-native-web-search`, and `web-search-and-fetch` are fulfilled.

Observed result after fix: Focused tests passed across tooling, e2e, and extension-qa Vitest shards; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: The live Docker lanes `test:docker:openai-chat-tools`, `test:docker:openai-web-search-minimal`, and `test:docker:openwebui` were not run locally.
target.author: romneyda
